name: Street Art
description: Spray paint any surface while rollerblading around

name: I Have a Crush on a Creeper?!?
description: A dating sim-themed entrant for ModFest 26

name: Kibss
description: An affection mod. Give affection to your friends <3

name: Berry Fantastic
description:
A simple mod that adds pies (with cake like features).

Made for Modfest 2026.

name: Japes!
description: Adds a few harmless and nearly-harmless schoolyard tricks.

name: Dual Stance
description: Pair up with your allies to boost your bond!

name: Lovely Bites
description: Feed your friends! Adds the ability to feed food in your offhand to other players, as well as a small addition in Strawberries and Chocolate.

name: AttireCraft
description: Some clothing items, and they can be nested

name: Psithurism
description: Bring Japanese culture into your home with new deco blocks, new food, traditional cosmetics and much more!

name: Off The Shelf
description: A mod about shelving with no shortage of block types

name: Peace Lily
description: Decorative flowers for your world!

name: Grappling Hooke
description: Springy! (Grappling hook but it behaves like a spring)

name: Menko
description: Adds the Japanese game, Menko, in Minecraft!

name: Kawaii
description: Adds a toast and Bombon boxes!

name: Booyah!
description: An amalgamation of things about popping balloons with an overly cool sword.

name: Lights, Camera, Action!
description: A simple mod created for ModFest 26: Animation, Affection, Academia! which brings masks to minecraft

name: Ensemble
description: Play music with your friends!

name: A Mod About Baking Soda
description: Modfest 26 entry that adds baking soda volcanoes and other things in that area

name: Kurasu
description: Adds lockers (you can place stuff in), classroom furniture, and more!

name: Combat Toggle
description: Allows players to toggle on and off their PvP-allowed status.

name: Productive Cherry Trees
description: Collect resources from falling leafs! Made for 2026 ModFest.

name: Etaerio Eaterie
description: Adds some food items to the game

name: Enamel
description: Hollow Knight/Paper Mario style Charm system, It's pin themed!

name: Monday Night Minin'
description: A Friday Night Funkin' inspired rhythm versus mod

name: Ikhemusek
description: Parry Everything

name: Syncope Synecdoche
description: A faint parallel. A little minescene mod for ModFest '26.

name: Lock And Key
description: A Fabric Mod which adds locking mechanics to Blocks, Entities and other things

name: Voidstain Hypoidol
description: A mod that adds 2-dimensional painting-creatures, and the ability to enter their homes.

name: Ren'mi
description: Visual novel scripting engine via Ink script

name: Bloom Festal
description: Quirky weapons and healing staves to spice up combat!

name: Archery Gimmicks
description: Adds a small handful of gimmick arrows, as well as a couple basic bow variants and a bow enchantment.

name: HoneyPots
description: Honey potions, with effects derived from the flowers pollinated to make it

name: Starbond
description: Grow stronger, together. Made for Modfest 26.

name: Batoru Academia
description: New combat related features like new weapons and a spell system inspired by Battle Academia

name: Advanced Classroom Furniture
description: Desks and chairs that you can knock around and move - experimental physics mod

name: Hotdognald's
description: The wurst mod - Everything you need to run your own hotdog joint!

name: Scriboodle
description: Scribble and draw on books and paper

name: Botanic Magic
description: A Minecraft mod made for Modfest 26 that adds mystical flowers that can be extracted to do magic

name: omikuji
description: Adds omikuji, fortunes given out for offerings at shrines and temples in Japan - with unpredictable effects!

name: astraglossa
description: Adds a tablet for very rudimentary transliteration intended for conlangs - supplementary learning material only!

name: Potion of Caring
description: Adds a new Potion that prevents hostility, and brings mobs closer together.

name: Reliable Gliders
description: A mod that adds a simple, immersive, and balanced Glider to the game!

name: One Button Doorbells
description: A project that seeks to add doorbells that exist within one block.

name: Magical Allayship
description: This mod adds a magical charm that'll help you protect your village and friends!

name: Absurdly Amazing Alloys
description: A mod that adds a few metals (and a few gems!) to your world. Yet another material mod. Made for ModFest 26!

name: Flowers Galore!
description: Adds animal crossing like flower breeding

name: Slime Time
description: Bounce around with Slime Boots, throwable Slime Balls, Slime Buckets, and more - powered by a backport of the Bounciness attribute.

name: Chalkboard
description: Adds a chalkboard block and any color chalks

name: Mugann
description: Dark academic blocks to suit your sinister studies

name: Letters Of Effection
description: Made for ModFest 26, a mod adding in Letters to Minecraft acting like smaller Book and Quills (Very Unfinished)

name: Arbitration
description: Adds something from a certain someone. (Made for modfest 26)

name: Assorted Appetizers
description: Various assorted foodstuffs... not all of which, admittedly, are appetizers.

name: Meowdemic
description: Meow? Meow! There's a disease going around which makes you meow like a cat...

name: Under The Cherry Trees
description: Adds red version of cherry trees, branches and tree hollow

name: petsful
description: player petting mod, completely client-sided!
